issue_summary: Deprecate ChecksumCalculatingInputStream in favor of java.util.zip.CheckedInputStream
javadoc_before:
/**
 * Calculates the checksum of the data read.
 *
 * @NotThreadSafe
 * @since 1.14
 */
javadoc_after:
/**
 * Calculates the checksum of the data read.
 *
 * @NotThreadSafe
 * @since 1.14
 * @deprecated Use {@link CheckedInputStream}.
 */
